meaning: adj.无标题的,无称号的,无权利的
examples: The full-length feature, as yet untitled, will include interviews plus footage of their live gigs.
Relativity's still-untitled Snow White film, starring Lily Collins as Snow and Julia Roberts as the Evil Queen, is scheduled to be released on March 16.
A blank form is created and you can see a new section called Untitled (form).
In an untitled 1933 pen-and-ink drawing by Rosella Hartman, a nude couple contemplates a woodland waterfall.
In 1942 Max Ernst visited her studio in New York and admired an untitled self-portrait of Tanning.
